user_query:
I maintain a small static microsite for our location analytics services. Please optimize the two city landing pages for on-page SEO using the included keyword data, and update our site configuration with the correct domain. Inputs: - content/cities/new-york.html - content/cities/san-francisco.html - data/keywords.csv (columns: city, primary_keyword, secondary_keyword, monthly_searches) - config/site.yaml (site_name is set, base_url is empty) - input/domain.txt (contains the canonical site domain) Requirements: 1) Read data/keywords.csv and map each page’s city to its primary_keyword. Determine the city from the

in each HTML file or from the filename. Read input/domain.txt and set config/site.yaml base_url to this value (leave site_name unchanged). 2) For each HTML page in content/cities/: - In , add a that includes the primary_keyword and our brand, formatted to be clear and between 45–60 characters. Append " | GeoInsights" to the end of the title. - In <head>, add a <meta name="description"> that is action-oriented, references the city, includes the primary_keyword exactly once, and is between 140–160 characters. - In <head>, add a canonical tag: <link rel="canonical" href="{base_url}/cities/{slug}/"> where base_url comes from config/site.yaml (after you update it) and slug is the filename without .html (e.g., new-york). - Rewrite the existing <p class="hero"> so it’s clearer and more direct, preserves the page’s city context, and is no more than 30 words. - Keep other content unchanged. Avoid duplicating existing head tags if you run the task multiple times. 3) Save modified HTML files in place and update config/site.yaml in place with the new base_url. 4) Produce a report at output/seo_report.csv with columns: page_file, city, primary_keyword, title, title_length, meta_description, description_length, canonical_url, hero_word_count. Values should reflect the final files you wrote so lengths and URLs can be verified from disk. 5) Create output/commit_message.txt containing a concise (<=120 characters) commit message describing the SEO and config updates. Deliverables: - Updated config/site.yaml with base_url set from input/domain.txt - Updated HTML files at content/cities/*.html with the new title, meta description, canonical link, and rewritten hero paragraph - output/seo_report.csv summarizing the final changes and length metrics - output/commit_message.txt with a brief summary All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
